name: Oxygen Theme Settings

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Add Obsidian 1.13 declarative settings; fix multi-window theme and style real-time apply

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidvkimball/obsidian-oxygen-settings/compare/0.3.11...0.3.13

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Drop the inline sourcemap from production builds for reproducibility

An inline sourcemap base64-embeds the build machine's absolute file
paths into main.js, so a CI build and the Obsidian scorecard's
reproducer produce byte-different output and the "build verification"
check fails even from identical source.

Gate the sourcemap on build mode: production (pnpm build) now ships
`sourcemap: false`, while the dev/watch build keeps `sourcemap:
"inline"` for local debugging. Production main.js is now deterministic
given the locked dependency tree, so the reproducer matches. Bonus:
smaller shipped main.js, no leaked build paths.

Bump to 0.3.11.

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidvkimball/obsidian-oxygen-settings/compare/0.3.10...0.3.11

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
- Refactored main.ts: Extracted migration logic and theme detection into src/utils/ for better performance and maintainability.
- Updated .agent/ skills: Enhanced AI guidelines for CSS, mobile compatibility, and terminology consistency.
- Project cleanup: Removed legacy src/settings-new.ts and updated .gitignore to exclude package-lock.json.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Removed focus features. Use UI Tweaker.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Fixed a bug: hiding workspace borders and changing contrast settings wouldn't work properly.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Can revert the file explorer icon to default Obsidian with a setting.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Scoped settings container to avoid affecting other plugins.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fix all linting issues across codebase

- Fix SettingGroup addSetting callbacks to use block body instead of expression body
- Replace unsafe any types with proper type guards and interfaces
- Add void operators to all onChange callbacks to fix promise misuse
- Fix command names to remove plugin name and ensure sentence case
- Replace direct style assignments with CSS classes
- Remove unused imports and variables
- Fix console.log to console.debug for migration logging
- Add proper type safety for JSON parsing in PresetManager

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Rename all minimal- prefixes to oxygen- and improve auto-hide tab bar

- Replace minimal- with oxygen- prefix throughout entire plugin codebase (16 files, 233+ instances)
- Update all CSS class constants (PLUGIN_THEME, CUSTOM_PRESET_PREFIX, etc.)
- Update all color scheme arrays (LIGHT_SCHEMES, DARK_SCHEMES)
- Update all style arrays (LIGHT_STYLES, DARK_STYLES)
- Update all dropdown options in ColorSchemeSettings
- Update all class toggles in style-manager (focus-mode, status-off, folding, etc.)
- Update custom preset class handling throughout preset system
- Add migration logic to automatically convert existing user settings
- Improve background blur effect (remove glow, use subtle blur)
- Add OS-specific offsets for auto-hide tab bar feature
- Make view-header draggable when tab bar is hidden
- Add Platform detection for Windows/macOS-specific styling
- Offset view-actions on Windows and view-header-left on macOS to avoid OS buttons

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Remove hardcoded border CSS, plugin now only toggles classes

- Remove 325 lines of border-related CSS from plugin styles
- Move all border styling logic to theme
- Plugin now only toggles borders-on, borders-none, and minimal-theme classes
- Theme handles all CSS styling based on plugin's class toggles

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Refactor settings to use SettingGroup API and migrate UI hiding features

- Migrate all UI hiding features to UI Tweaker plugin
- Refactor all settings sections to use SettingGroup API (Obsidian 1.11.0+)
- Group custom preset controls into "Custom color schemes" section
- Remove divider from color scheme dropdowns
- Improve spacing around preset list
- Add SettingGroup type extension for backward compatibility
- Update README with migration notice

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Add background blur feature and improve help button replacement

- Add enableBlur setting with backdrop-filter effects
- Improve help button replacement observer with fallback logic
- Improved hider features to be 1:1 parity with the original plugin.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fixed visual bug when "auto hide on 1 tab" option is enabled.
Updated plugin description.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Make help button replacement independent and add compatibility measures

- Remove dependency: "Replace help button" now works independently of "Hide help button"
- Add unique identifiers (data attribute and class) to custom button to avoid conflicts with other plugins
- Enhance DOM checking: verify button has unique identifier before managing it
- Fix cmdr icon styling: ensure cmdr buttons in view-actions match default view-action button color/opacity
- Improve button persistence: check DOM presence and unique identifier in MutationObserver
- Update CSS logic: hide help button if either setting is enabled

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Restored intended tab design.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Split sidebar toggle button settings into separate left/right controls

- Replace combined hideSidebarButtons with hideLeftSidebarButton and hideRightSidebarButton
- Add migration logic to convert existing settings
- Update UI to show separate toggles for left and right sidebar buttons
- Add separate CSS classes for independent control
- Maintain backward compatibility with deprecated hideSidebarButtons setting

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Add comprehensive button/icon hiding options and mobile navigation customization

- Port hide button/icon settings from Lumines theme (desktop and mobile)
- Add desktop hide buttons: new note, new folder, sort order, auto-reveal, collapse all, reading mode, search settings
- Add mobile hide icons/buttons: chevrons, navigate back/forward, quick switcher, new tab, open tabs, ribbon menu
- Add tab icon hiding: tab list, new tab, close button
- Add mobile navigation menu button position customization (6 buttons, 1-6 positions)
- Add mobile new tab icon swap (home icon replacement)
- Reorganize settings structure: move platform-agnostic settings to main Hider section, desktop/mobile sections separate
- Remove "Collapse all other navigation bars" setting (redundant with auto-hide features)
- Update mobile navigation menu descriptions to show default positions

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
## Release 0.1.6 Summary (upgrading from 0.1.3)

**1. Add auto-collapse ribbon and deemphasize properties features**
- Auto-collapse ribbon (Adrenaline style): collapses left ribbon to thin strip until hover
- Deemphasize properties (Meridian style): softens visual prominence of file properties
- Ribbon collapse includes sidebar toggle button synchronization
- Smooth transitions and background-secondary color support

**2. Reordered hider settings items**
- Reorganized settings for better logical grouping

**3. Add Meridian-style auto-hide features for navigation headers and buttons**
- Auto-hide file explorer nav header (completely hidden until hover)
- Auto-hide other nav headers (tag, backlinks, outgoing links, outline, bookmarks)
- Auto-hide left and right tab headers
- Auto-hide settings button
- Removed deprecated collapse-file-explorer-buttons implementation
- Renamed collapse setting to "Collapse all other navigation bars" (excludes file explorer)
- All new auto-hide features default to off with smooth fade-in transitions

**4. Add animation system controls for Oxygen theme**
- Animation personality setting (default/playful/off) with dropdown
- Animation speed slider (0-2 range, default 1)
- Animations applied via body classes
- Migration from 'refined' to 'default' personality
- Speed slider hidden when animations are disabled
- Credit to Baseline theme for these enhancements

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
## Integrated Hider plugin functionality

- Created new Hider settings section (between Features and Layout)
- Moved Focus mode and Auto-hide title bar from Features to Hider section
- Added all Hider plugin settings:
  - Hide tab bar
  - Hide status bar
  - Hide scroll bars
  - Hide sidebar toggle buttons
  - Hide tooltips
  - Hide file explorer buttons
  - Hide search suggestions
  - Hide count of search term matches
  - Hide instructions
  - Hide properties in Reading view
  - Hide vault name
- Added Hider CSS classes and styling
- Added Hider commands: Toggle tab bar, Toggle status bar

## Additional Hiding Options

- Hide properties heading (from Style Settings)
- Hide "Add property" button (from Style Settings)
- Auto-hide vault switcher (adapted from Baseline theme, disabled when Hide vault name is enabled)
- Hide help button

## Collapse File Explorer Buttons

- Added "Collapse file explorer buttons" feature (adapted from Baseline's compact-actions-indicator)
- Collapses buttons to a slender pill indicator (70px × 5px) until hover
- Includes support for cmdr buttons (treated same as nav-action-button)

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed borders setting persistence issue - migration now only runs when workspaceBorders hasn't been explicitly set

## Removals
Removed Zen mode feature.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Added more robust border style options, indentation guide settings, and Zen mode.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Fixed sentence case in UI and removed unused CSS generator.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Remove unused imports and deprecated method

- Remove unused CSS_CLASSES import from custom-preset-css.ts
- Remove deprecated generatePresetCSS method from PresetManager.ts

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fix plugin validation issues: sentence case, promise handling, type safety, and CSS injection

- Convert UI text to sentence case (10 locations)
- Add void operator to unawaited promises (7 locations)
- Replace any type assertion with proper getVaultConfig helper
- Refactor custom preset CSS to use body CSS properties instead of style elements (Obsidian compliance)
- Remove unused ColorPalette import

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fix plugin submission issues: replace any types, remove unused imports, fix sentence case, use setCssProps utility

- Replace `any` types with proper App type in settings files
- Remove unused imports (ColorPalette, HSLColor, generateColorSwatch, DEFAULT_COLOR_PALETTE)
- Fix sentence case in UI text (Light Mode → Light mode, Dark Mode → Dark mode)
- Create setCssProps utility and replace all element.style.setProperty calls
- Add documentation for dynamic style element creation (required for custom presets)
- Remove unused accentL variable from preset-color-defaults.ts

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Code quality improvements and CSS architecture refactor

- Replace deprecated substr() with substring()
- Add void operator to all saveData() promise calls
- Remove any type casts and improve TypeScript type safety
- Refactor CSS application: use CSS custom properties on body instead of style elements
- Add title bar auto-hide functionality with CSS classes
- Convert UI text to sentence case throughout
- Remove unused constants and variables
- Fix command delegation patterns (direct method calls instead of any casts)
- Add conditional dashed underline setting (UI only, requires CSS support)

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Add auto-hide title bar toggle and improve type safety

- Add hideTitleBarOnHover setting (default: true) to control title bar visibility
- When disabled, override CSS to always show title bar instead of hover-only
- Create typed helper functions in src/types/obsidian-extensions.ts for Obsidian internal APIs
- Replace as any casts with typed helpers across commands and managers

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Resolve infinite loops, add frame override, improve preset editing

- Remove CSS observer causing infinite update loops and DOM flashing
- Add frameLightnessOffset control for colorful-frame feature customization
- Fix preset data persistence (frameLightnessOffset being stripped on import)
- Filter custom presets from dropdowns when disabled, auto-reset to defaults
- Add live preview for preset editing with real-time UI updates
- Fix initialization order preventing custom preset CSS from loading on startup
- Add empty string validation to prevent scheme class crashes
- Apply style updates immediately when saving active preset edits

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
## What's New

### Performance Improvements
- **Optimized theme detection** with caching and debouncing to reduce CPU usage
- Added 100ms debounce to css-change event handler to prevent excessive checks
- Cache Oxygen theme active state to minimize expensive vault config lookups

### Theme Compatibility
- **Plugin now only activates when Oxygen theme is active**, preventing conflicts with other themes
- Automatically detects theme changes and cleanly initializes/cleans up styles as needed
- Ensures custom presets and color schemes only apply to Oxygen theme

### UX Enhancements
- Improved color picker with clickable preview swatch and direct hex input
- Fixed accent color to respect Obsidian's native color picker
- Calculate text-on-accent contrast using WCAG luminance for better readability

### Bug Fixes
- Removed duplicate Style Settings configuration (now lives in theme only)
- Fixed preset editor styling and color override functionality

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Initial release.
